title: Altered Beast
description: Co-op arcade survival — track lives and progress through levels. Most levels cleared wins.

p1_lives.notes: AR: FFB120:03. P1 lives. Poll at 0xB120.

p2_lives.notes: AR: FFB126:03. P2 lives. Poll at 0xB126.

p1_health.notes: AR: FFCF10:0C. P1 health. Poll at 0xCF10.

p2_health.notes: AR: FFCF50:7F. P2 health. Poll at 0xCF50.

p1_power_up.notes: AR: FFD02B. P1 power-up level (beast transformation stage 0-3).

stage.notes: AR: FFFE15 stage select. Current stage.

tournament_rules: Arcade co-op — track which player survives furthest through stages. Tiebreaker: most lives at game over. Power-up level (beast form) is secondary ranking metric.
notes: MD version preferred over SMS — better graphics, tighter controls, 2P simultaneous co-op is smoother.
sources: libretro-database/cht MD AR: FFB120 P1 lives, FFCF10 P1 health, FFB126 P2 lives, FFCF50 P2 health
name: Altered Beast
